curation_notes: The patch modifies only one non-test source file (pxr/usd/usd/crateFile.cpp). The fix adds duplicate detection for path indexes in the _ReadCompressedPaths function. Previously, only range checking was performed on path indexes. Corrupt .usdc files with duplicate indexes caused multiple threads to concurrently mutate the same SdfPath object in _BuildDecompressedPathsImpl, triggering a use-after-free. The pre-assigned class use-after-free (CWE-416) is correct as confirmed by the advisory description and patch diff. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern.
